semanticCore: Completion, keeping promise, death, or full measure
quranicRelevance: Fulfilling covenants (Wafa'), giving full measure ('awfoo al-kayl'), and death/taking the soul (Wafat).

keyDerivations.meaning: To fulfill, keep (promise), give in full, or complete
To pay in full, repay, or recompense fully
To take the soul in death, or cause to die
Death, or taking of the soul

figurativeOrRareUsages: يَتَوَفَّاكُمْ بِاللَّيْلِ (6:60): Takes your souls at night (in sleep, representing minor death).
أَوْفَى الكَيْلَ: Give full measure (honesty in trade).
discardedNoise: The abundance of hair on a specific breed of goats.
Obscure details on the completion of water wells.
summaryEn: The root spans completion and fulfillment, representing the human obligation to fulfill promises (Wafa') and the divine act of taking the soul in death (Wafat).
summaryAr: يجمع هذا الجذر بين الإيفاء والتوفي، ممثلاً الواجب البشري بالوفاء بالعهود (وفاء) والفعل الإلهي بقبض الأرواح عند الموت (وفاة).
rawText: أَوْفَى عَلَيْهِ 4 He looked upon it, looked upon it from above, looked down upon it; got a view of it; or saw it; syn. أَشْرَفَ عَلَيْهِ, (S, Msb, K, TA,) and اِطَّلَعَ; and اوفى فِيهِ [likewise] signifies اشرف. (TA.) === See 2. اِسْتَوْفَاهُ 10 and 🡻تَوَفَّاهُ He [exacted,] took, or received, it fully, or wholly. (Mgh.) See an ex. voce عَلَى. === See 2. === اِسْتَوْفَى [He completed] so many years of his age. (A, O, in TA, voce احفر.) تَوَفَّاهُ ٱللّٰهُ 5 God took his soul, (S, K,) [either at death, or in sleep. See the Kur-án, vi. 60]: or caused him to die. (Msb.) === See 2 and 10. وَافَى بِهِ 3 He brought it: see a verse cited in art. سجد. === See 2. وَفَى بِالعَهْدِ 1 and [He fulfilled, performed, kept, or was faithful to, the compact, or covenant, and the promise]: act. part. n. وَفِىٌّ; pl. أَوْفِيَآءُ. (Msb.) === وَفَآءٌ signifies The being faithful to an engagement, or promise: see 1, last sentence, in art. رعى. === وَفَاهُ He paid it: see an ex. (فِى ثَوْبَىْ أَبِى أَنْ أَفِيَهُ) voce ثَوْبٌ. وَفِىٌّ : see وَفَى. === وَفِىُّ العَهْدِ [A fulfiller, performer, or keeper, of the compact, or covenant. (TA, voce إِلٌّ.) وَفَّاهُ حَقَّهُ 2 and 🡻اوفاهُ and 🡻وافاهُ and 🡻توفّاهُ and 🡻استوفاهُ He paid, or rendered, to him fully, or completely, his right, or due. (K. [In the CK, اَوْفاهُ is erroneously put for وَافَاهُ.])
